title: Computer Science & Logic Evaluation
description: A brief preliminary assessment of general computer science knowledge and logic.

questions.text: Which of the following data structures operates on a Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) principle?
What is the time complexity of a binary search algorithm in the worst-case scenario?
Which of these is NOT a primary key property in relational databases?
If all Bloops are Razzies and all Razzies are Lazzies, then are all Bloops Lazzies?
